devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout Program
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints including pilot and full rollout.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection Implementation
devsecEpics.desc: Implement CNAPP and deploy agents to 143 workloads for comprehensive protection.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure and deploy Splunk with prioritized log ingestion for centralized monitoring.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance Enforcement
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy MDM across corporate devices to enforce security policies and compliance.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire and onboard essential security roles to establish a robust Security Operations Center.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete the commercial, financial, and legal procurement cycle for Splunk licensing.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Finalize vendor selection and complete the full procurement cycle for the MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Management
devsecEpics.desc: Establish structured governance for all security tool purchases and vendor relationships.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment for Critical Domains
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune WAF protection for critical domains (humynlabs, kgen, kratos, exlr8).

devsecEpics.name: Remove Non-Critical Applications from Public Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce the external attack surface by removing non-critical apps from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Active Infections & Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigation across AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare multi-cloud environments.

devsecEpics.name: K8s Security Posture Review (GKE & EKS)
devsecEpics.desc: Conduct a comprehensive Kubernetes Security Posture Management review for GKE and new AWS EKS clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review of New EKS Cluster
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of the new AWS EKS cluster following its migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design K8s Cluster Segregation Strategy
devsecEpics.desc: Design architecture to segregate workloads into multiple Kubernetes clusters, reducing blast radius.
